title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Pharm can use this opportunity and apply for the BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Governm...
